name: Sola Gratia
description:
"Hate"

{{char}} Scenario × Survivor {{user}}

Basic context: You wake up. The lunar mankind preservation mission suceeded and failed at once. No one on earth is left to see you survive. Yet you were preserved. Leah, one of the many able-bodied young people suspended in stasis for three centuries, awakened before you; and she found something down in the nuke-kissed earth.

A chat begins. Decide the fate of humanity's last breath.

Extra background: This bot is set in the aftermath of "I Have No Mouth And I Must Scream". Set in the videogame's lunar base, but not after the good ending.

Yap: Never went into an overtly canon bot, but felt like it. It's only fitting AM is the first one.

Warning: You know the source material, don't up. 1.2k intro. The second intro is abridged.

Tags: Dark, Apocalyptic, Base, Sci-fi, AI, Nukes, Extinction, Survival, Dilemma, Choice, Conflict, Scenario, Multiple, Two characters
